form.formComment: Comes off a 51 day let-up. Last start 4th of 9 at this track on February 17 over 1900m, 2.5 len behind Imola carrying 57.5kg at $3.80. The run before that couldn't go on with it; 7th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on January 30 over 2200m, 7 len behind Velvet Red with 58kg at $9.50. Rates highly and should run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Comes off a 51 day let-up. Last start 4th of 9 at this track on February 17 over 1900m, 2.5 len behind Imola carrying 57.5kg at $3.80. The run before that couldn't go on with it; 7th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on January 30 over 2200m, 7 len behind Velvet Red with 58kg at $9.50. Rates highly and should run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung left-handed inside the final furlong.

form.formComment: Last start 6th of 13 at Bath on April 5 over 1600m, 6 len behind Volendam with 61kg at $5. The run before that 5th of 8 at this track on February 17 over 1900m, 3 len behind Wave Rock with 60.5kg at $10. Good enough to turn things around.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Last start 6th of 13 at Bath on April 5 over 1600m, 6 len behind Volendam with 61kg at $5. The run before that 5th of 8 at this track on February 17 over 1900m, 3 len behind Wave Rock with 60.5kg at $10. Good enough to turn things around.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 7th of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on March 19 over 2000m, 6 len behind Mao Shang Wong carrying 57kg at $17. Previously second-up second last of 8 at Leicester on May 26 over 2400m, 11 len behind Tazaman with 55.5kg at $11. Strips fitter and is among the chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Second-up. First-up after seven months 7th of 10 at Newcastle All Weather on March 19 over 2000m, 6 len behind Mao Shang Wong carrying 57kg at $17. Previously second-up second last of 8 at Leicester on May 26 over 2400m, 11 len behind Tazaman with 55.5kg at $11. Strips fitter and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Last start 6th of 12 at Lingfield All Weather on March 27 over 2000m, 3.5 len behind Latin carrying 61kg at $29. The race before that 4th of 8 at Chelmsford on March 12 over 2000m, 3 len behind He's Our Cracker carrying 66.5kg at $34. Rates highly on best form and gets his chance to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Last start 6th of 12 at Lingfield All Weather on March 27 over 2000m, 3.5 len behind Latin carrying 61kg at $29. The race before that 4th of 8 at Chelmsford on March 12 over 2000m, 3 len behind He's Our Cracker carrying 66.5kg at $34. Rates highly on best form and gets his chance to feature.

form.formComment: Most recently 6th of 14 at Bath on April 5 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Scenario with 58kg at $7. Before that won by a nose at Kempton Park All Weather March 25 over 1600m defeating Whiteley Way carrying 57kg at $9.50. Finds a nice race this time and is likely to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Most recently 6th of 14 at Bath on April 5 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Scenario with 58kg at $7. Before that won by a nose at Kempton Park All Weather March 25 over 1600m defeating Whiteley Way carrying 57kg at $9.50. Finds a nice race this time and is likely to feature.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 7th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 9 len behind Mr Fustic carrying 60kg at $41. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Ripon on July 29 over 1600m, 19 len behind Abloom with 58kg at $201. Looks tested on the first up effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Second-up. First-up after five months 7th of 11 at Southwell All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 9 len behind Mr Fustic carrying 60kg at $41. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Ripon on July 29 over 1600m, 19 len behind Abloom with 58kg at $201. Looks tested on the first up effort.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran too free in the early stages of the race.
Hung badly left-handed off the bend, causing him to lose considerable ground.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 10 at Lingfield All Weather on March 25 over 2000m, 5 len behind Haveagobeau with 61kg at $12. The race before that 6th of 9 at this track on March 9 over 1700m, 5 len behind Always Fearless with 54kg at $11. Likely to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). At the latest run 5th of 10 at Lingfield All Weather on March 25 over 2000m, 5 len behind Haveagobeau with 61kg at $12. The race before that 6th of 9 at this track on March 9 over 1700m, 5 len behind Always Fearless with 54kg at $11. Likely to measure up.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming raced on the pace before fading ran last of 11 at this track on January 19 over 1900m, 27 len behind Al Baahy with 61kg at $17. Last start 5th of 8 at this track on March 17 over 1900m, 3 len behind Balqaa carrying 61kg at $26. Will need to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Third-up today. Resuming raced on the pace before fading ran last of 11 at this track on January 19 over 1900m, 27 len behind Al Baahy with 61kg at $17. Last start 5th of 8 at this track on March 17 over 1900m, 3 len behind Balqaa carrying 61kg at $26. Will need to do a bit more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Upon leaving the stalls, jumped sharply left-handed crowding Beaming Light.

form.formComment: Back from a long spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 11 at Kempton Park All Weather on September 18 over 1600m, 20 len behind Island Ocean carrying 55.5kg at $15. When resuming last campaign second last of 11 at Great Yarmouth on June 11 over 1600m, 34 len behind Banksman with 56kg at $6.50. Cannot recommend until he shows a bit more.
